steps.title: Identify the key goal
steps.content: The student wants to “emphasize a difference” between the two asteroid types. From the notes, the defining difference is compositional: C-type asteroids contain carbon, while S-type asteroids contain silicate minerals.

steps.title: Find which choice makes this contrast explicit
steps.content: C-type asteroids are mainly composed of carbon, whereas S-type asteroids are primarily made up of silicate minerals. directly states and contrasts each type's composition, so D is correct.
